d: When targeting an adjacent enemy, Lucca knocks them into the air and then slams them down in place. When targeting an enemy located closer to his allied backline, Lucca will rush at them and slam them back to his original tile. The slam deals [[200%]]<ATK> damage to the target and their adjacent enemies, stunning them for [[2]]s. Lucca is immune to control effects while casting this skill, and if auto cast is enabled, he will prioritize targets that are closer to his allied backline.
Increases the damage dealt to [[210%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[220%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[230%]]<ATK>.
Increases the damage dealt to [[240%]]<ATK>.

Lucca gains a shield that absorbs damage equal to [[340%]] of his Phys DEF plus [[340%]] of his Magic DEF for [[8]]s. He then shoulders into an enemy, dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage, [[interrupting]] them, and [[disarming]] them for [[4]]s.
Increases the shield value to [[360%]] Phys DEF plus [[360%]] Magic DEF.
Increases the shield value to [[380%]] Phys DEF plus [[380%]] Magic DEF.
Increases the shield value to [[400%]] Phys DEF plus [[400%]] Magic DEF.

Lucca unleashes a fierce roar, removing all dispellable debuffs from himself and reducing his damage taken by [[25%]] for the next [[5]]s. This skill can be cast while Lucca is under dispellable control effects.
Reduces damage taken by [[28%]].
Reduces damage taken by [[31%]].
Reduces damage taken by [[35%]].
Increases max HP by [[17%]] during battle.
Increases max HP by [[23%]] during battle.
Increases max HP by [[29%]] during battle.

Lucca maintains a solid fighting stance, remaining [[steadfast]] during the battle. For each ally placed in an adjacent tile behind him when a battle starts, he gains a shield equal to [[220%]] of the ally's ATK. Allies supporting Lucca also receive a [[5%]] boost to their ATK.
Increases the shield value to [[240%]] of the ally's ATK.
If at least 2 allies are placed to support Lucca, expands Ruthless Ram's area of effect to a 1-tile arc in front.
Increases the shield value to [[260%]] of the ally's ATK.
Lucca recovers [[15%]]<HP> HP when casting Courageous Call.

Lucca increases the Phys & Magic DEF of adjacent allies placed behind him during Battle Preparation by [[30%]]. In battle, when these allies take [[melee damage]], Lucca immediately casts his Ultimate on a valid target that dealt the melee damage, without consuming Energy. This effect can trigger once per battle.
